g.text: orange-brown · the signature fans · actual size
little fans that open at the front
These sniff the air. On the
brown body · black head · orange fan antennae
· It flies at dusk on warm May
· Its white grubs live in the soil
· The fan antennae sniff the air
lay the pieces on the mat
it's a puzzle, not a glue-up
Fan the antennae a little each
time — no two builds are alike.
A Giant Insect World felt puzzle
build it · take it apart · build it again
